useEffect(()=>{socket.emit("join",{user});socket.on("online_users",users=>{setOnlineUsers(users.filter(u=>u!==user));});// Only register once, do NOT put currentChat in dependencies
socket.on("receive_private",msg=>{setMessages(prev=>[...prev,msg]);});socket.on("typing",data=>{setTyping("".concat(data.user," is typing..."));setTimeout(()=>setTyping(""),1500);});return()=>{socket.off("receive_private");socket.off("typing");socket.off("online_users");};},[user]);// only run once
